parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ seller: $json.seller, asking_price: $json.asking_price, arv: $json.arv, repairs: $json.repairs, beds: $json.beds, baths: $json.baths, sqft: $json.sqft, zoning: $json.zoning }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ address: $json.address, sqft: $json.sqft || 0, beds: $json.beds || 0, baths: $json.baths || 0, comps: $json.comps || [] }) }}
={{ JSON.stringify({ arv: $json.arv || $('Trigger ARV Engine').first().json.arv || 0, repair_costs: $json.repairs || 0, desired_profit: 15000 }) }}
